## Intro 

A small C++20 library that provides a useful set of containers and algorithms for 
lightweight computer graphics applications.  Also contains a run-time binding system
based on C++ concepts.

## Documentation

- [Containers](documentation/containers.md)
- [Binding](documentation/binding.md)
